Wary allies show there's no quick fix to Trump's Iran crisisEuropean leaders are hesitant to help Trump secure the Strait of Hormuz, but they know inaction on the Iran war is not really an option. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c8r17plnvy3o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c8r17plnvy3o#0 Mon, 16 Mar 2026 17:34:13 GMT

Starmer announces £53m to help households most hit by rising heating oil costsThe money will be for "vulnerable" households who have faced a sharp rise in energy bills since the outbreak of the US-Israeli war with Iran. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cp9mgpzn901o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cp9mgpzn901o#0 Mon, 16 Mar 2026 15:34:58 GMT
Schoolgirl 'traumatised' after being wrongly sent to England for abortionThe teenager could have been treated in Northern Ireland, but was sent to London due to confusion over the services available.
